name: Anthropic
description: AI safety and research company building reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems for enterprise and consumer use, focused on responsible frontier model development.
innovation_rationale: Pioneered Constitutional AI, an RLHF alternative that reduced harmful outputs by using AI-generated feedback instead of purely human labels.
market_traction_rationale: Raised a $13B Series F round in March 2025, valuing the company at approximately $61.5B.

innovation_rationale: Very innovative solution with a strong team.
market_traction_rationale: Good market position with great potential.
